goal: Full board: 'Save your fortune' pill wrapped to 2 lines; board dimmed from the 1st pick
fix: full.css §2: .full-topbar--board grid → flex space-between (deck pill left, save chip right), streak-chip flex:0 0 auto + white-space:nowrap so 'Save your fortune' stays 1 line. Dimming: setupBoard now toggles .is-complete (selectionGoal>1 && selected>=goal); full.css dims unpicked cards on .is-complete instead of .has-selection → board stays vibrant until all 10 picked.
verified: chrome MCP @390 full.html: streak label height 13px (1 line); after 1 pick has-selection=true but is-complete=false and unpicked opacity≥0.9 (no dim). md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: Daily/question dim behaviour unchanged (they use has-selection; only the full board switched to is-complete).
